results.title: Principal Analyst - Responsible AI (Remote) | Wfh
highlights:
Principal Analyst - Responsible AI (Remote) | Wfh
...
# Principal Analyst - Responsible AI (Remote)
...
United's Digital Technology team is comprised of many talented individuals all working together with cutting-edge technology to build the best airline in the history of aviation. Our team designs, develops and maintains massively scaling technology solutions brought to life with innovative architectures, data analytics, and digital solutions.
...
The Principal Analyst - Responsible Artificial Intelligence validates that our services, applications, and websites are designed and implemented in accordance with United's secure development and responsible AI standards. The Principal Analyst is a senior level position that works closely with development teams, product teams, and other teams across the organization to integrate security into the product lifecycle from design, deployment, and recurring testing.
...
- The Principal Analyst is a recognized subject matter expert in defining security requirements, performing application assessments, and providing application teams with remediation guidance and advice. On any given day, the Principal Analyst for Responsible AI can be pulled in to evaluate a new system, review a proposed application change, or provide guidance on application security/coding best practices.
...
- Leads responsible architecture design evaluations and threat modelling of our products (both bought and built)
...
- Recommends and implements products/services that support operational needs and responsible AI requirements
...
- Promotes and contributes to the continuous improvement of our Responsible AI strategy through accurate, reusable documentation and education materials
...
- Perform code analysis of applications, manually and using SAST, DAST, and SCA scanning solutions as well as conducting manual vulnerability analysis
...
- Technical point of contact for product teams as it relates to Responsible AI at United
...
- Sought out as a trusted advisor/consultant and assists in
...
creation of security designs, requirements, risk monitoring and mitigation guidance in alignment with industry best practices and regulatory requirements
...
- Bachelor's degree in STEM, Computer Science, or related field
...
- Minimum of 5+ years of experience in related field
- Deep understanding of Generative Artificial Intelligence and its associated risks
...
- Ability to collaborate with development teams to build secure solutions, communicating risks and bringing consensus to diverse priorities
...
- Knowledge of common vulnerabilities and attack vectors against a GenAI model such as prompt attacks, training data extraction, and data poisoning
...
- Excellent understanding of web applications, web servers, layer 7 application technologies, frameworks and protocols with respect to application development and deployment
...
- Minimum of 12 years of experience in related field, including any combination of the following: threat modeling, secure coding, identity management and authentication, software development, cryptography, system administration and network security, cloud computing
...
- Thought leadership publishing within the Responsible AI or Generative AI categy
- Familiar with waterfall and agile development processes and ability to integrate secure development practices into both models
...
- Experience with multiple programming languages

results.title: Jeremy
highlights:
United Airlinesunited.
...
# Manager - Predictive Maintenance Engineering (Engines and APUs)
...
Lead a team of engineers developing predictive maintenance and health monitoring solutions for United Airlines' aircraft engines and APUs, bridging data science and operational reliability across the fleet.
...
## Tech Stack
...
Data Visualization Data Analytics Reliability Engineering Project Management Stakeholder Management
...
The Manager of Predictive Maintenance Engineering (Engines and APUs) is responsible for leading a team of engineers focused on developing and implementing innovate predictive alerting and health monitoring solutions to improve operational reliability specifically focused on United’s engines and APUs.
...
The Manager will guide and facilitate a team of engineers throughout the alert evaluation and development process which will include but be not limited to developing an understanding of aircraft engine operation, evaluation of data availability, and coordination with other stakeholders to ensure robust solutions are crafted with the intent to turn unexpected system failures into scheduled maintenance.
...
The Manager will be a liaison for predictive maintenance engineering across the Tech Ops organization and will be an active participant in aircraft and engine reliability discussions to ensure robust reliability solutions are developed for the fleet.
...
- Manage the team’s delivery of health monitoring and predictive maintenance use cases and alerts for their fleet area of focus (aircraft, engines or other assets) and facilitate the development of solutions to address key reliability and operational issues using asset data
...
- Collaborate with Data Science and Digital Technology teams to deploy use cases and incorporate new features in predictive maintenance and health monitoring products as required to operationalize alerts
...
- Develop, evaluate and maintain queue of predictive use case opportunities in-line with Tech Ops strategic direction
...
- Provide ongoing reporting of predictive alert performance and effectiveness, incorporate alert performance reporting into United’s reliability program and recommend alert retraining or logic updates as required for their fleet area of focus (aircraft, engines or other assets)
...
- Effectively coordinate and communicate with other stakeholders within United to drive meaningful operational integration of alerting
...
- Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or 4 years of relevant work experience
- Minimum 5 years’ experience in a business, engineering or data driven role
- 2 years’ experience in a leadership/supervisory role or leading a matrixed project team
- Working knowledge on both Boeing and Airbus aircraft and engines
...
- Familiarity with predictive maintenance and reliability concepts and implementation
...
- Proven project management, organization, and thought leadership skills with the ability to
...
, productive teams
...
### What will help you propel from the pack (Preferred Qualifications)
...
- Master's degree
- Airline experience or operations experience in a similar industry
- Experience working with aircraft engine, ground equipment or other asset sensors and fault data
- Familiarity with modern data analytic concepts including Machine Learning, statistical programming, data visualization, etc

highlights:
United Airlines Machine Learning Engineer Interview Questions 2026

United Airlines Machine Learning Engineer Interview Questions 2026

United AirlinesMachine Learning Engineer
...
# United Airlines Machine Learning Engineer interview questions & guide 2026
...
### What is a Machine Learning Engineer at United Airlines?
...
As a **Machine Learning Engineer** at **United Airlines**, you will be at the intersection of massive-scale logistics and cutting-edge data science. You are not just building models; you are solving the complex optimization challenges inherent in global aviation, from dynamic pricing and flight scheduling to predictive maintenance and passenger experience personalization.
...
The impact of your work is tangible and immediate. By refining algorithms that process vast amounts of operational data, you directly contribute to the efficiency of the world’s most interconnected airline. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to turn raw data into strategic insights, ensuring that **United Airlines** maintains its competitive edge through technical innovation and operational excellence.
...
### Common Interview Questions
...
#### Technical Competency and
...
Explain LLM Concepts
...
Getting Ready for Your Interviews
...
Preparation for a role at **United Airlines** requires a blend of rigorous technical review and a deep understanding of how your work serves the business. Approach your preparation by focusing on the "why" behind your technical choices, as the interviewers are looking for engineers who connect model performance to operational outcomes.
...
**Role-related knowledge** – You must demonstrate mastery over the data stack, particularly **SQL** and machine learning frameworks. Be prepared to explain not just how to code a solution, but why you chose a specific approach over alternatives.
...
The interview journey for a **Machine Learning Engineer** at **United Airlines** is designed to be thorough yet collaborative. You can expect an initial screening with a recruiter, followed by one or more rounds with technical team members. The atmosphere is generally described as professional and welcoming, with a focus on evaluating your practical skills rather than abstract theory.
...
Proficiency in **SQL** is non-negotiable. You will be evaluated on your ability to write efficient, readable, and complex queries to extract insights from large datasets.
...
### Key Responsibilities
...
As a **Machine Learning Engineer**, you will spend your time bridging the gap between raw operational data and actionable intelligence. You will be responsible for designing and maintaining the data pipelines that feed your models, ensuring that the information is clean, reliable, and accessible.
...
Collaboration is a daily
...
. You will work closely with software engineers to integrate your models into existing systems and with product managers to define the success metrics for your initiatives
...
Your work is expected to be
...
### Role Requirements & Qualifications
...
* **Must-have skills**: Advanced **SQL** proficiency, experience with Python or R for data modeling, and a deep understanding of standard machine learning libraries.
...
* **Nice-to-have skills**: Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP, or Azure), knowledge of distributed computing frameworks like Spark, and familiarity with CI/CD pipelines for ML models.
...
Focus on demonstrating your ability to deploy models, not just build them. The team is interested in candidates who understand the full lifecycle of a machine learning product.
...
The role of **Machine Learning Engineer** at **United Airlines** offers a unique opportunity to apply sophisticated modeling techniques to one of the most complex operational environments in the world. By focusing on your **SQL** proficiency, your ability to communicate complex ideas, and your capacity to solve real-world logistical problems, you will position yourself as a top-tier candidate.

results.title: United Airlines AI Engineer Interview Questions & Guide 2026
highlights:
United Airlines AI Engineer Interview Questions & Guide 2026
...
United AirlinesAI Engineer
...
# United Airlines AI Engineer interview questions & guide 2026
...
### What is an AI Engineer at United Airlines?
...
An AI Engineer at United Airlines plays a pivotal role in bridging the gap between cutting-edge artificial intelligence and the complex, fast-paced world of aviation logistics. Unlike tech-only environments where models live purely in digital ecosystems, your work at United Airlines directly impacts physical operations, thousands of daily flights, and millions of travelers. You will design, build, and deploy machine learning and AI models that optimize real-time airport operations, enhance flight scheduling, and streamline resource allocation.
...
The impact of this position is immense. From optimizing gate assignments and predicting baggage handling bottlenecks to automating maintenance scheduling and enhancing passenger flow, your solutions keep the airline running smoothly and safely. You will work on massive, high-velocity datasets that reflect the unpredictable nature of global travel, requiring models that are not only highly accurate but also resilient and adaptable to real-world disruptions.
...
What makes this role uniquely exciting is its highly cross-functional nature. You will not build models in a vacuum; instead, you will collaborate closely with airport operations managers, digital product teams, and IT infrastructure specialists. This ensures that the AI products you develop are seamlessly integrated into the daily workflows of frontline employees, translating complex mathematical outputs into intuitive, actionable decisions at the gate and on the tarmac.
...
20Evaluate an LLM SystemGenerative AI & LLMsMediumVery common
...
As an AI Engineer at United Airlines, your day-to-day work will be dynamic, challenging, and deeply integrated with physical airline operations. You will spend your time translating complex operational data into intelligent systems that drive efficiency across the enterprise.
...
- Designing, training, and deploying machine learning models to solve complex logistics, scheduling, and predictive maintenance challenges.
...
- Collaborating directly with airport operations managers and directors to understand frontline pain points and identify opportunities where AI can drive efficiency.
...
- Processing, cleaning, and analyzing massive datasets from various airline systems, including flight tracking, baggage routing, and passenger reservations.
...

...

- Familiarity with big data technologies like Spark, Hadoop, or Databricks.
...
Securing an AI Engineer role at United Airlines is an exceptional opportunity to apply advanced technology to one of the world's most complex logistical challenges. By combining your technical expertise in artificial intelligence with a highly collaborative, operations-focused mindset, you can build systems that improve the travel experience for millions of passengers daily.

...
I’m a Data Scientist and GenAI Engineer with 4+ years of experience building and deploying production-grade machine learning and AI systems across aviation, fintech, and healthcare. In my current role at Southwest Airlines, I work on large-scale AI applications, including RAG-based systems on AWS Bedrock, delivering measurable improvements in efficiency and cost. I also led the migration from GPT-4 to Bedrock, reducing infrastructure costs by 78% with zero downtime. My experience spans end-to-end ML system development using Python, SQL, NLP, and large-scale data pipelines. I’ve built and deployed solutions that processed millions of records, including NLP pipelines for 2M+ monthly communications at American Express and ML models that identified $4.2M+ in anomalous healthcare claims at UHG Optum. I focus on building reliable, production-ready systems that solve real business problems and work closely with cross-functional teams to drive impact. I’m currently open to opportunities in Data Science, Machine Learning, and Generative AI roles across the United States. If you’re hiring or building impactful AI systems, I’d be glad to connect. 📧 tharunkumarp0627@gmail.com | 📞 +1 919-919-0710

# Associate CASS Data Scientist
...
Posted Jun 18, 2026
...
As an Associate CASS Data Scientist, you’ll help drive the analytical backbone of Southwest’s Continuing Analysis and Surveillance System (CASS), turning complex operational data into insights that strengthen safety, compliance, and reliability. You’ll develop automated workflows, build models, and apply advanced analytics—including machine learning and AI—to detect trends, assess risk, and optimize the health of our Continuous Airworthiness Maintenance Program. Partnering closely with Tech Ops, CASS Leadership, and cross‑functional stakeholders, you’ll create dashboards and predictive tools that inform critical decisions and support the ongoing improvement of our maintenance programs. By blending strong analytical methods with real‑world operational understanding, you’ll play a key role in ensuring our fleet stays safe, efficient, and ready to serve our Customers.

results.title: Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote) | Wfh
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote) | Wfh
...
# Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote)
...
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity)
...
### Location: United States
...
Department: Data Science
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
...
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of
...
This position is US - Remote Eligible. The role may include occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager. While the position is Remote Eligible, you must live in a state where Airbnb, Inc. has a registered entity. Click here for the up-to-date list of excluded states. This list is continuously evolving, so please check back with us if the state you live in is on the exclusion list. If your position is employed by another Airbnb entity, your recruiter will inform you what states you are eligible to work from.

results.title: **Experienced Full Stack Data Scientist – Advanced Analytics and Business Intelligence** | Hirevector
highlights:
**Experienced Full Stack Data Scientist – Advanced Analytics and Business Intelligence** | Hirevector
...
# **Experienced Full Stack Data Scientist – Advanced Analytics and Business Intelligence**
...
At arenaflex, we're on a mission to revolutionize the way we travel and connect with each other. As a leader in the airline industry, we're committed to innovation, diversity, and inclusion. Our Advanced Innovation group is at the forefront of this movement, harnessing the power of data science, artificial intelligence, and machine learning to drive business growth and improve customer experiences.
...
**Job Summary**
...
We're seeking an experienced Full Stack Data Scientist to join our Advanced Innovation group. As a key member of our team, you'll be responsible for developing and implementing advanced analytics and business intelligence solutions that drive business growth and improve customer experiences. You'll work closely with cross-functional teams to identify business opportunities, develop data-driven insights, and implement solutions that drive results.
...
- Develop and implement advanced analytics and business intelligence solutions using machine learning, artificial intelligence, and statistical modeling techniques
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify business opportunities and develop data-driven insights
- Design and implement data visualizations and dashboards to communicate insights and results to stakeholders
- Develop and maintain large-scale data models and algorithms using programming languages such as R, Python, and Julia
- Work with data engineers to design and implement data pipelines and architectures
- Collaborate with business stakeholders to understand business needs and develop solutions that meet those needs
- Develop and maintain technical documentation and knowledge base to support team members and stakeholders
- Stay up-to-date with the latest trends and advancements in data science, machine learning, and artificial intelligence
...
**Essential Qualifications**
...
- Postgraduate education (PhD or ABD) in a quantitative field such as statistics, mathematics, or computer science
- Strong background in machine learning, artificial intelligence, and statistical modeling techniques
- Experience with programming languages such as R, Python, and Julia
- Experience with data visualization tools such as Tableau, Power BI, or D3.js
- Strong business acumen and ability to communicate complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders
- Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills
- Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and prioritize multiple projects and tasks
...
**Preferred Qualifications**
...
- Experience with software engineering and formal high-level software engineering coursework
- 2+ years of professional experience in a data science or related field
- 1+ year of experience in the airline industry or a related field
- Experience with Julia programming language
- Knowledge of arenaflex/industry data sources
- Organized programming for large-scale computer models
- Shown ability to create business value
...
If you're a motivated and talented data scientist looking for a new challenge, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity. Please submit your resume, cover letter, and any relevant work samples or projects. We can't wait to hear from you!

# Senior Generative AI Engineer (Engineer Machine Learning 4) - 26195
...
- Meet HII's Mission Technologies Division
- Our team of more than 7,000 professionals worldwide delivers all-domain expertise and advanced technologies in service of mission partners across the globe. Mission Technologies is leading the next evolution of national defense - the data evolution - by accelerating a breadth of national security solutions for government and commercial customers. Our capabilities range from C5ISR, AI and Big Data, cyber operations and synthetic training environments to fleet sustainment, environmental remediation and the largest family of unmanned underwater vehicles in every class. Find the role that's right for you. Apply today. We look forward to meeting you.
...
HII-Mission Technologies is seeking a Senior Generative AI Engineer to join the team. This will be a remote position, with occasional travel to the team's office in Annapolis Junction, MD. This role will support the team in creating and managing end-to-end generative AI solutions. The team supports AI and digital modernization for both internal use and for external clients, with applications from intelligence analysis to manufacturing optimization.
...
- Operational AI Implementation: Research, develop, and apply machine learning, deep learning, and large language model (LLM) techniques for deployment in operational environments.
...
- Full Stack Design and Development: Rapidly design and create prototype applications to demonstrate AI capabilities. Transition prototypes to production by designing and implementing well-architected, scalable software stacks.
...
- Client Engagement: Support meetings with internal clients and external customers as a subject matter expert in AI and advanced software solutions, with a focus on cloud technologies and generative AI.
...
- 9 years relevant experience with Bachelors in related field; 7 years relevant experience with Masters in related field; 4 years relevant experience with PhD or Juris Doctorate in realted field; or High School Diploma or equivalent and 13 years relevant experience.
...
- Containerized development and
...
Rancher, and/or K8s.
...
- Cloud engineering: Azure, AWS, or GCP.
...
- Databases: SQL, NoSQL, and/or vector databases.
...
- Hands-on experience with current open-source LLMs and ecosystem tools (e.g., model serving, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, embeddings).
- Experience developing generative AI products or platforms, including multimodal use cases (e.g., text, vision, audio, document understanding).
...
- Bachelors in Data Science, Computer Science, Mathematics, or equivalent technologies/experience.
- Experience with:
...
- UI/UX development: JavaScript (Angular, React).
- Backend development: REST API, web apps, microservices.
- Experience supporting feature development and maintenance for an enterprise-scale application.
- Experience building multi-step agentic workflows and orchestrators using frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, PromptGraph, or custom in-house pipelines.
...
- We build the world's most powerful, survivable naval ships and defense technology solutions that safeguard our seas, sky, land, space and cyber. Our workforce includes skilled tradespeople; artificial intelligence, machine learning (AI/ML) experts; engineers; technologists; scientists; logistics experts; and business administration professionals.

results.title: Senior Data Scientist, Platform | Wfhforgeon
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Platform | Wfhforgeon
...
# Senior Data Scientist, Platform
...
Posted Jun 23, 2026
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems
...
- A Typical Day:
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- Inference: Partner with inference data scientists to conduct rigorous quantitative analyses, applying working knowledge of causal inference to interpret results, assess impact, and identify gaps and opportunities to improve content quality and trust outcomes.
...
- Empowerment: Think strategically about how to scale and evolve Airbnb’s content integrity defenses, helping define the long-term vision for the role of AI-driven content understanding across the Trust ecosystem.
...
- Your Expertise:
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of causal inference
...
- Skilled in statistical programming (Python or R) and database usage (SQL)

results.title: Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization | CareerSync
highlights:
Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization | CareerSync
...
# Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization
...
Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence are at the heart of the Airbnb product. From Trust to Payments, and from Customer Service to Marketing we rely on ML to ensure that guests and hosts have the best possible experience with Airbnb.
...
The CS AI product team is responsible for driving CSxAI (Customer Support x Artificial Intelligence) initiatives by adopting the Generative AI technologies to enable an intelligent, scalable and exceptional service experience. The team develops and enhances various AI models, ML services and tools including LLM fine-tuning, alignment and optimization, RAG/Search, LLM evaluation and testing automation, feedback-based learning and guardrail for a wide range of applications in Airbnb.
...
As a principal machine learning engineer, you will be responsible for fine-tuning state-of-the-art LLMs for diverse use cases while optimizing models for high-performance deployment on Airbnb’s ML Infrastructure. You will partner with product managers, software engineers, data scientists and operation teams to brainstorm, design and develop AI products such as AI Assistant, Autonomous agent, recommendation, travel planning, and many more products that make meaningful impacts in the world of travel.
...
- Work with large scale structured and unstructured data; explore, experiment, build and continuously improve foundation models for Airbnb product, business and operational use cases.
...
- Create a multi-year tech roadmap that enables our team to stay on the leading edge of the rapidly evolving AI landscape and leverage the best in class technologies to deliver customer benefits.
...
- Continuously evaluate recent and upcoming large foundational models, ensuring the selection and refinement of the highest quality models for enhanced performance and efficiency.
...
- Hands-on prototype, develop and productionize LLM models and pipelines at scale, including both batch and real-time use cases.
...
- Drive key AI architectural decisions for products, and contribute to Airbnb’s ML platform architecture and strategy.
...
- Minimum Qualifications:
...
- PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Mathematics, Statistics, or related technical field.
- 10+ years of experience with developing machine learning models and products at scale from inception to business impact.
- Programming experience in Python and hands-on experience with frameworks such as PyTorch.
...
- Proven record of training, fine tuning, optimizing models and inference run-time
...
- Post-training experience in areas like data processing for fine-tuning; responsible LLMs; LLM alignment; reinforcement learning; efficient training and inference; language model evaluation; and/or multilingual and multimodal modeling.
...
- Or specialized experience in runtime optimizations, model quantization, compression, on-device inference, GPU inference, pytorch, kernel development
...
- Preferred Qualifications:
...
- PhD in AI, machine learning, data science, or related technical fields.

- Publications at peer-reviewed AI conferences (e.g., NeurIPS, CVPR, ICML, ICLR, ICCV, and ACL).
...
- Customer Support Systems: Experience with AI technologies in customer support applications.
...
- Agile Practice for AI production: Experience with the entire AI product development lifecycle from incubation to production at scale, following agile practices in the Applied AI/ML domain.
...
- Infrastructure Acumen: Experience deploying and scaling business-critical AI services and driving architectural requirements on ML infrastructures
